name: parent-project-skills
description: Bootstrap skill for discovering additional skills and context from a parent project when workerd is used as a submodule.
intent_triggers: use the parent project skills agent skill
run a workflow for parent project skills
help me with parent project skills
我需要處理 parent project skills 相關工作
幫我啟用 parent project skills 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 parent project skills
use parent project skills from workerd

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the parent project skills skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
